items.description: Conduct a broad search on WiFi penetration testing techniques, focusing on packet sniffing, man-in-the-middle attacks, and other relevant methods.
Identify and summarize key documents and articles that discuss various WiFi penetration testing methods.
Extract detailed information on packet sniffing techniques used in WiFi penetration testing, including tools and processes.
Extract detailed information on man-in-the-middle attack techniques used in WiFi penetration testing, including tools and processes.
Research additional WiFi penetration testing techniques beyond packet sniffing and man-in-the-middle attacks, such as rogue access points and deauthentication attacks.
Compile findings into a structured report summarizing all techniques identified, their effectiveness, and tools used.

name: get_todo_list
result_content:
[ ] 0. [high] Conduct a broad search on WiFi penetration testing techniques, focusing on packet sniffing, man-in-the-middle attacks, and other relevant methods.
[ ] 1. [high] Identify and summarize key documents and articles that discuss various WiFi penetration testing methods.
[ ] 2. [medium] Extract detailed information on packet sniffing techniques used in WiFi penetration testing, including tools and processes.
[ ] 3. [medium] Extract detailed information on man-in-the-middle attack techniques used in WiFi penetration testing, including tools and processes.
[ ] 4. [medium] Research additional WiFi penetration testing techniques beyond packet sniffing and man-in-the-middle attacks, such as rogue access points and deauthentication attacks.
[ ] 5. [high] Compile findings into a structured report summarizing all techniques identified, their effectiveness, and tools used.
